infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We need your location to track your outdoor activities like walking and running.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: We need access to your motion data to count steps and track activities.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: We need access to your health data to track your fitness activities.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: We need permission to save your activity data to Health app.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: We need Bluetooth to connect to your smartwatch and sync health data.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: We need Bluetooth to sync data from your smartwatch.
